body:
## Rationale

The Iron Maiden / Nicko McBrain cluster is actively building: Dance of Death (#2711 open), A Matter of Life and Death (#2712 open), Fear of the Dark (#2702 open), Book of Souls (#2857 open), Senjutsu (#2868 open). But two UK #1 albums are completely absent:

- **Brave New World (2000)** — Bruce Dickinson reunion album. UK #1, #1 Germany. "The Wicker Man" = signature Nicko track. LLM hook: "What was the first Iron Maiden album with Bruce back?" Fills the essential Seventh Son (#2702) → Brave New World → Dance of Death (#2711) arc link.
- **The Final Frontier (2010)** — UK #1, Grammy-nominated "El Dorado" (Best Metal Performance 2011). Double Platinum. Fills A Matter of Life and Death (#2712) → Final Frontier → Book of Souls (#2857) arc.

**Confirmed MISSING from DB (198 slugs):** `brave-new-world-drum-setup`, `final-frontier-drum-setup`
**Not in any open seo-proposal (100 checked).**

## Files to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 2 new entries
- `public/llms/articles/brave-new-world-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/final-frontier-drum-setup.md`

## Data shapes

```js
'brave-new-world-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'brave-new-world-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'Brave New World',
  artist: 'Iron Maiden',
  drummer: 'Nicko McBrain',
  relatedDrummerSlug: 'nicko-mcbrain',
  year: 2000,
  genre: 'Heavy Metal / NWOBHM',
  label: 'EMI Records',
  peakChart: '#1 UK, #1 Germany, #39 US Billboard 200',
  relatedAlbums: ['final-frontier-drum-setup', 'dance-of-death-drum-setup'],
  gearHighlights: 'Premier kit, Paiste cymbals — reunion-era setup; "The Wicker Man" intro gallop; classic Nicko double bass work',
},
'final-frontier-drum-setup': {
  slug: 'final-frontier-drum-setup',
  albumTitle: 'The Final Frontier',
  artist: 'Iron Maiden',
  drummer: 'Nicko McBrain',
  relatedDrummerSlug: 'nicko-mcbrain',
  year: 2010,
  genre: 'Heavy Metal / Progressive Metal',
  label: 'EMI Records',
  peakChart: '#1 UK, #1 US, Grammy-nominated (Best Metal Performance — El Dorado 2011)',
  grammyNominated: true,
  relatedAlbums: ['brave-new-world-drum-setup', 'book-of-souls-drum-setup'],
  gearHighlights: 'Premier Artist kit; Paiste cymbals; longest Iron Maiden average song length; progressive drumming extended into 9-10 minute tracks',
}
```

## Quality gate (each article)

- ≥300 words per article
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A ("What drums does Nicko McBrain use on Brave New World?", "Did Iron Maiden win a Grammy for The Final Frontier?", "What is Nicko McBrain's technique on The Wicker Man?")
- ≥3 internal links each (nicko-mcbrain profile + adjacent arc articles)
- Person + MusicGroup + Article schema
- LLM .md files for both

## Estimated organic uplift

Grammy nomination on The Final Frontier triggers AI Overview eligibility. Brave New World is the most-searched reunion-era Maiden album. Completing the IM arc adds 6 hop link paths through the cluster. Serves "nicko mcbrain drum kit" (emerging GSC entity as proposals ship).

## Verify

1. Both slugs in ALBUM_ARTICLES
2. Both /articles/[slug] return 200
3. Both /llms/articles/[slug].md return markdown
4. relatedAlbums chain: brave-new-world → final-frontier → book-of-souls (#2857)
5. Grammy data present in Final Frontier article

## Done

When both articles are in DB and LLM .md files are live.
title: SEO batch: Iron Maiden 'Brave New World' + 'The Final Frontier' drum setup articles (Nicko McBrain, 2000+2010 — both UK #1, Grammy-nominated El Dorado, fills IM arc)
